rationale: Test failures from internal BSON API changes; conditioning tests on BSON version, no spec rule violated.
CI infrastructure migration from Travis CI; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
API ergonomics—DDL helpers lacking write concern passthrough; no spec rule contradicted.
Adding Evergreen CI configurations for snappy compression on MongoDB 3.4; CI config, not spec conformance.
Internal code cleanup investigating leftover Regexp integer option handling; no spec rule involved.
Fixing test failures from removing BSON key validation; internal test cleanup, no spec deviation.
Removing IllegalKey validation and dots/dollars check from BSON; internal API cleanup, not contradicting a spec rule.
Command monitoring spec test runner not asserting cursorsUnknown field; test assertion gap in YAML test runner.
Read/write concern spec says MUST raise error for non-default read concern on MaxWireVersion < 4; driver ignores it silently.
Broken hyperlink in X.509 reference documentation; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Documentation improvement for X.509 username handling; no spec rule contradicted, customer UX feedback driving doc update.
Ruby-specific query cache behavior with concurrent cursor iteration; internal Ruby feature, not spec-defined behavior.
API ergonomics—whether Ruby collection view session propagates to count_documents; no specific sessions spec rule cited.
Issue split from DRIVERS-421, Improvement; cursor close behavior from another thread, proactive spec rollout.
User request to add pool object to CMAP events; CMAP spec does not require pool reference in event payloads.
Documentation improvement—adding list_collections to tutorial; no spec behavior involved.
Converting change stream spec tests to unified test format; Issue split from DRIVERS-1713, test infrastructure update.
Fixing flaky SDAM unified test expecting exactly 1 event but receiving 2 due to push monitor; test runner assertion fix.
Documentation noting command events not published for handshake/redacted commands; docs improvement, no spec violation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1692, Improvement; enabling TCP_USER_TIMEOUT socket option by default, proactive spec rollout.
Fixing flaky unified valid-pass test for hello with speculativeAuthenticate; test runner event count assertion fix.
ObjectId spec requires OS-entropy PRNG; driver used Kernel.rand which may not provide OS-supplied entropy per spec.
Adding load balancer test case for SRV resolving to 0 hosts; Issue split from DRIVERS-1835, spec test addition.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2249; updating docs.mongodb.com links in documentation and source, no spec behavior.
Adding Ruby idiomatic #to_d alias for Decimal128; language ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Adding to_s serialization to MongoDB URI class; Ruby API ergonomics, connection string spec doesn't require round-trip serialization.
Using monotonic time for timeout deadlines; internal implementation improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
Removing unified/invalid test directory mistakenly added in RUBY-2592; schema-validation-only tests, not for driver implementation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2412, Improvement; SDAM electionId vs setVersion priority for 6.0+ servers, proactive spec rollout.
Fixing redirect URL for mongoid.com; website infrastructure, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Updating valid-pass test files that have fallen out of sync; test infrastructure maintenance.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2377, Improvement; adding GCP attached service account support for KMS, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2449, Improvement; CSFLE mongocryptd client behavior with shared library, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1707, Improvement; preemptive operation cancellation on SDAM heartbeat timeout, proactive spec rollout.
Reverting RUBY-2496 breaking change that prevented client use after close; internal API ergonomics revert.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1647, Improvement; clearing pool on connection establishment failure in populator, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1476, Improvement; implementing spec guidance on pre-handshake command errors, proactive spec rollout.
FLE test expecting SocketError/ECONNRESET but getting 'certificate_required'; test environment mismatch, labeled no-changelog.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2369, Bug; spec requires disabling causal consistency in implicit sessions; driver was enabling it.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2489; improving test coverage for retryable handshake errors, coordinated spec test rollout.
URI options table not rendering in documentation; docs rendering bug, no spec behavior.
CSFLE spec defines option as cryptSharedRequired; Ruby driver used crypt_shared_lib_required, wrong name per spec.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2490, Improvement; removing deprecated getNonce command for 6.2+ servers, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2501, Bug; retryable writes spec error sequence for NoWritesPerformed-only errors was handled incorrectly.
Adding spec test for 500ms wait between failed isMaster checks; Issue split from DRIVERS-1251, spec test addition.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2507, Improvement; permitting tlsDisableOCSPEndpointCheck in KMS TLS options, proactive spec rollout.
Adding spec test for WaitQueue eviction error being retryable; Issue split from DRIVERS-1483, spec test addition.
Internal refactor of error retry abstraction in retryable.rb; no behavior change, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2286, Improvement; adding Range Index support for Queryable Encryption, proactive spec rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2548, Improvement; adjusting for server-side change making drop of nonexistent collection a noop.
